backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores and retrieves pattern configurations and signal history entries with access control, enforcing user-level permissions on all read/write operations and capping history at 50 entries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three live market data features (live feed polling, symbol selector, price ticker) to their implementing source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, covering styles, types, analysis libraries, hooks, components, and services.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Candle King Indicator' that mounts the React app at the #root div and loads the main TSX entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that orchestrates manual and live trading data modes, runs the full analysis pipeline on candle updates via useLiveMarketData, and composes the dashboard with chart, signal, ticker, and history panels.
frontend/src/components/CandlestickChart: Canvas-based candlestick chart component that renders OHLC candles, EMA overlays, S/R zone lines, and pattern labels with support for mouse-drag panning and scroll-wheel zoom.
Defines the main dashboard layout component that arranges header, ticker, data input, chart area, signal panel, history panel, and footer into a structured flex-based page.
frontend/src/components/DataInputPanel.t: Provides a collapsible panel for loading OHLC candle data via demo data or pasted CSV, with live mode toggle, symbol/timeframe selectors, and CSV validation logic.
Displays a live price ticker bar for a given symbol showing last price, 24h change, high, low, and volume using data from the useTickerData hook.
frontend/src/components/LiveStatusIndica: Renders a small animated status badge indicating whether live data is active, syncing, or in an error state.
frontend/src/components/LiveSymbolSelect: A dropdown selector component for choosing a live trading symbol from a predefined list of USDT pairs (BTC, ETH, BNB, etc.).
frontend/src/components/SignalDisplay.ts: Renders the current trading signal (BUY/SELL/HOLD) with confidence meter, trend indicator, score breakdown, and a save button.
frontend/src/components/SignalHistoryPan: Displays a scrollable list of recently saved signals fetched from the backend, showing symbol, timeframe, pattern, signal type, confidence, and timestamp.
frontend/src/components/VolumeChart.tsx: A React canvas-based volume chart component that renders OHLC volume bars with spike highlighting, syncing pan/zoom state with the main chart via a custom DOM event.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using the current Internet Identity for authentication and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveMarketData.ts: A React Query hook that fetches and periodically refetches OHLC candle data from Binance for a given symbol and timeframe, mapping raw kline data to OHLCCandle objects.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching signal history from the ICP backend actor and a mutation hook for saving new signal history entries.
frontend/src/hooks/useTickerData.ts: A React Query hook that fetches and periodically refetches 24-hour ticker data from Binance for a given symbol.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties and utility classes for the dark gold-themed design system.
frontend/src/lib/candlestick-patterns.ts: Implements detection functions for common candlestick patterns (Doji, Hammer, Shooting Star, Engulfing, Morning Star, etc.) returning PatternSignal objects with signal type and confidence scores.
frontend/src/lib/demo-data.ts: Exports a static array of 60 realistic BTC/USDT OHLC candles with embedded candlestick patterns for use as demo/fallback data.
frontend/src/lib/signal-aggregator.ts: Combines pattern, trend, support/resistance, and volume signals into a weighted FinalSignal with a confidence score and BUY/SELL/NEUTRAL classification.
frontend/src/lib/support-resistance.ts: Detects support and resistance zones from OHLC candles using swing highs/lows, round number levels, and session extremes, and provides a proximity check for a given price.
frontend/src/lib/timeframe-mapper.ts: Maps application timeframe labels (e.g. '1H', 'Daily') to Binance API interval strings, with a fallback to '1h' for unknown values.
frontend/src/lib/trend-analysis.ts: Calculates EMA values (20/50/200) from OHLC candles and determines trend direction (UP/DOWN/SIDEWAYS) using EMA alignment and higher-highs/lower-lows logic.
frontend/src/lib/volume-analysis.ts: Provides volume analysis utilities including average volume calculation, spike detection (1.5× average threshold), volume confirmation, and low-volume warnings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/services/binance-api.ts: Fetches OHLCV kline data and 24-hour ticker statistics from the Binance public REST API without requiring an API key.
frontend/src/types/trading.ts: Defines core TypeScript interfaces and types for trading data including OHLCCandle, PatternSignal, SupportResistanceZone, FinalSignal, EMAData, and direction/signal enums.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens including trading-specific colors (bull, bear, gold, surface), custom fonts, shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 5) for a 'Candle King' trading indicator, listing architectural notes, existing features, and requirements covering pattern detection, trend analysis, volume analysis, signal aggregation, live data feeds, and UI components.
